owner.description: Default GitHub user or organization for all repo groups. Can be overridden per group.
owner.title: Default owner

settings.description: Named groups of GitHub repository settings (passed to the repos.update API)
settings.title: Settings groups

additionalProperties.description: Named secrets with their value sources
additionalProperties.title: Secret entries

secrets.description: Named groups of secrets. Each entry maps a secret name to a value source (file, value, json, or op).
secrets.title: Secret groups

additionalProperties.description: Named variables with their value sources
additionalProperties.title: Variable entries

variables.description: Named groups of variables. Each entry maps a variable name to a value source (file, value, json, or op).
variables.title: Variable groups

additionalProperties.description: Named rulesets with their value sources (typically file references to JSON)
additionalProperties.title: Ruleset entries

rulesets.description: Named groups of rulesets. Each entry maps a ruleset name to a value source (file, value, json, or op).
rulesets.title: Ruleset groups

cleanup.title: Cleanup defaults
cleanup.description: Default cleanup behavior for all repo groups. Can be overridden per group.

repos.description: Named groups of repositories with their settings, secrets, variables, and ruleset assignments
repos.title: Repository groups

description: Configuration for syncing GitHub repository settings, secrets, variables, and rulesets
title: gh-sync Configuration

file.description: Path to a file containing the value, resolved relative to the config directory
file.title: File path

json.description: An inline object that will be serialized to a JSON string
json.title: JSON object

op.description: A 1Password secret reference resolved at runtime via the 1Password SDK
op.title: 1Password reference

ValueSource.description: A value source: file path, inline string, JSON object, or 1Password reference
ValueSource.title: Value source

secrets.title: Clean up action secrets
secrets.description: Delete action secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

variables.title: Clean up action variables
variables.description: Delete action variables not declared in any referenced variable group

dependabot_secrets.title: Clean up Dependabot secrets
dependabot_secrets.description: Delete Dependabot secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

codespaces_secrets.title: Clean up Codespaces secrets
codespaces_secrets.description: Delete Codespaces secrets not declared in any referenced secret group

rulesets.title: Clean up rulesets
rulesets.description: Delete repository rulesets not declared in any referenced ruleset group

preserve.title: Preserve lists
preserve.description: Resource names to never delete during cleanup

Cleanup.description: Controls deletion of resources not declared in config. All disabled by default.
Cleanup.title: Cleanup configuration

secrets.title: Preserved secrets
secrets.description: Action secret names that should never be deleted during cleanup

variables.title: Preserved variables
variables.description: Action variable names that should never be deleted during cleanup

dependabot_secrets.title: Preserved Dependabot secrets
dependabot_secrets.description: Dependabot secret names that should never be deleted during cleanup

codespaces_secrets.title: Preserved Codespaces secrets
codespaces_secrets.description: Codespaces secret names that should never be deleted during cleanup

rulesets.title: Preserved rulesets
rulesets.description: Ruleset names that should never be deleted during cleanup

CleanupPreserve.description: Resource names to preserve during cleanup (never delete)
CleanupPreserve.title: Preserve lists

owner.description: GitHub user or organization that owns these repos. Overrides the top-level owner.
owner.title: Owner override

names.description: List of repository names (without owner prefix) to sync in this group
names.title: Repository names

credentials.description: Name of the credential profile to use. If only one profile exists, it is used automatically.
credentials.title: Credential profile

settings.description: Names of settings groups to apply to these repos
settings.title: Settings groups

rulesets.description: Names of ruleset groups to apply to these repos
rulesets.title: Ruleset groups

RepoGroup.description: A named group of repositories with their resource assignments
RepoGroup.title: Repository group

actions.description: Secret groups to sync as GitHub Actions repository secrets
actions.title: Action secret groups

dependabot.description: Secret groups to sync as Dependabot secrets
dependabot.title: Dependabot secret groups

codespaces.description: Secret groups to sync as Codespaces secrets
codespaces.title: Codespaces secret groups

SecretScopes.description: Assign secret groups to GitHub secret scopes (actions, dependabot, codespaces)
SecretScopes.title: Secret scopes

actions.description: Variable groups to sync as GitHub Actions repository variables
actions.title: Action variable groups

VariableScopes.description: Assign variable groups to GitHub variable scopes
VariableScopes.title: Variable scopes
